summary: Recording is severely flawed with speed issues and horrible sound quality; no musical highlights noted.
review: The sole review condemns the recording for being out of sync and sounding terrible, rating it a single star. No comments on the performance itself are provided, so the show cannot be evaluated beyond the technical disaster.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one extremely negative review focusing on recording problems; no positive or neutral data to offset the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Playback speed appears incorrect, resulting in horrible sound; overall quality described as 'shit' by reviewer.
